title: Warmed Goat Cheese with Sundried Tomatoes
ingredients: ½ cup sundried tomatoes in olive oil
2 large roasted red peppers, cut into strips
¼ cup pitted Kalamata olives, coarsely chopped
1 clove garlic mixed with 1 tbsp olive oil
Sprigs of fresh rosemary or thyme
instructions: Place the goat cheese log in the center of a decorative baking dish. Cut the tomatoes into small pieces and place around log. Take strips of peppers and form a lattice design on top of goat cheese. Place remaining peppers around cheese along with olives. Top with garlic/olive oil mixture and pine nuts and bake, covered for 10 minutes in 350 degree oven until heated through. Serve with sprigs of rosemary or thyme on top and crostinit in a basket alongside.
Recipe from Marguerite Henderson cooking class.
